description: Golden retrieval set for the ohmyboring eval gate. Each query names the fixture id(s) (frontmatter id of files under data/eval/fixtures/) that should rank at the top of recall. Queries are paraphrases — they deliberately avoid copying the fixture title verbatim so they test real retrieval, not string match. The local fixture ids here are resolved to the wiki-NNNN ids that drudge allocates at ingest time by data/eval/run_eval.py.

queries.query: database keeps throwing too many clients errors under load
users randomly logged out, token used before issued auth errors
docker build reinstalls all dependencies on every code change
list lags and re-renders every row while typing in the search box
pod restarts with OOMKilled because memory limit too low
find which commit introduced a flaky intermittently failing test
async task hangs forever when a lock stays held over an await point
browser blocks my cross-site request with cookies on the OPTIONS check
endpoint slow because it issues one extra query per row in a loop
memory grows and goroutines pile up stuck sending on a channel nobody reads
consumer group keeps reassigning partitions and handling the same events twice
a pattern match pins the cpu and hangs on certain crafted strings
two simultaneous saves overwrite each other and a change silently disappears
after failover the app keeps connecting to the dead host address
when a popular cached entry expires every request recomputes against the db at once
